introduction: Outside of design, I value being outdoors with the thrill of occasional spontaneity such as:

activities.caption: A two-week catamaran journey from Italy to Tunisia with a 36-hour rainy cruise to Corsica
An 18-hour autumn hike through Korea's rugged Mount Seoraksan fighting Ajumas and Ajussis along the trail
A freezing night spent on a 2000-meter peak under the brightest stars with only a sleeping bag
Exploring Korean culture and cuisine (especially Bibimbap or Mulnaengmyeon)
Whether exploring new trails or pushing my limits, I find a lot of inspiration outdoors.
